description: Create a new SLD style named 'cities_sorted' in the 'ne' workspace to render the 'ne_populated_places' layer. The style must use a PointSymbolizer with a red (#FF0000) circle of size 10 and include the 'sortBy' VendorOption to ensure cities with larger populations ('pop_max') are drawn on top of smaller cities. Associate this style with the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer. Access the GeoServer web admin at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (admin / Admin123!).
